name: McAfee
tagline: Best for families with excellent multi-device coverage
description: McAfee offers strong protection with industry-best family plans covering unlimited devices, making it ideal for households with many devices.
longDescription: McAfee has reinvented itself in recent years with a streamlined product and aggressive pricing for multi-device plans. The standout feature is the family plan: for a single subscription, you can protect an unlimited number of devices across Windows, Mac, Android, and iOS. In our malware tests, McAfee scored a 98.5% detection rate. The suite includes a VPN (unlimited on premium plans), password manager, file shredder, and identity monitoring. McAfee's web protection is particularly strong, blocking 100% of phishing attempts in our tests.
pros: Unlimited device protection on family plan
VPN with unlimited data on premium plans
cons: Slightly slower full scans than competitors
No independent audit of VPN no-logs policy
Free version is limited to 30-day trial

keyFeatures.name: Protection Score
keyFeatures.description: Unique security health score that rates your overall digital safety. Checks for weak passwords, outdated software, and exposed personal info.

keyFeatures.name: WebAdvisor
keyFeatures.description: Browser extension that blocks malicious websites and marks safe search results with color-coded icons.

keyFeatures.name: QuickClean
keyFeatures.description: One-click system cleanup that removes temporary files, browser caches, and app leftovers. Frees up disk space on older computers.

keyFeatures.name: Identity Protection
keyFeatures.description: Monitors up to 60 pieces of personal information including email addresses, phone numbers, credit cards, and bank accounts on the dark web.

verdict: McAfee is the best choice for families and households with many devices. The unlimited device coverage on family plans provides unmatched value, and the strong phishing protection keeps less tech-savvy family members safe online.

faqs.question: How many devices can I protect with McAfee?
faqs.answer: The McAfee+ Premium Family plan covers an unlimited number of devices. The Individual/Couple plans cover 1 or 2 devices respectively, and the Family plan has no device limit.

faqs.question: Is McAfee's VPN good?
faqs.answer: McAfee's VPN (Safe Connect) has improved significantly and now offers unlimited data on premium plans. It uses WireGuard protocol for good speeds, but the server network is modest (50+ countries) compared to dedicated VPN services.

author.name: Sarah Mitchell
author.title: Senior Tech Reviewer
author.bio: Sarah has been evaluating cybersecurity products for 7 years.

seoMeta.title: McAfee Review 2026: 8.9/10 Rating | TrueTopReviews
seoMeta.description: In-depth McAfee review covering malware protection, family plans, and pricing. Rated 8.9/10. Best for families.
